mechanism_components.description: Price maintains sequence of higher highs and lower lows, but with a modified twist: when RELIANCE is trading range-bound, the price structure becomes more volatile and less persistent, taking into account additional factors such as FII buying and sector performance. The new mechanism incorporates a stronger emphasis on delivery and asset liquidity fade, while also considering the impact of short-term momentum weakening.
mechanism_components.expected_behavior: Each day's high > previous high, each low < previous low (when RELIANCE is trading range-bound) or Each day's high > previous high, each low > previous low (otherwise) with a greater emphasis on the latter, considering factors like delivery, FII buying, and sector performance.
